articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) Network Added 100,000 Wallets so Far This Month, Data Shows
articles.description: Data from the Cardano ($ADA) network shows that the number of wallets on it has grown by over 100,000 so far this month in the wake of FTX’s collapse, as cryptocurrency users are seemingly moving their funds to wallets they control on-chain. articles.description: Alabama and several other U.S. states are investigating alleged securities violations and connections with retail investors.

articles.title: Aragon Project adds $20 million in ether to treasury for safety amid FTX collapse
articles.description: The Aragon project swapped $20 million worth of USDC and wrapped bitcoin for ether (ETH) to rebalance its treasury.

articles.description: Crypto whales are abruptly moving hundreds of millions of dollars worth of XRP, Binance Coin (BNB), Polygon (MATIC), and Curve (CRV). New data from what-surveying platform Whale Alert shows that deep-pocketed crypto investors have been shifting their altcoins to and from unknown crypto wallets and crypto exchange platforms. articles.title: Caroline Ellison, hate, misogyny, FTX, and the media – Making sense of it all
articles.description: There is something unequivocally spellbinding about the bear market. It reveals investors’ prudence and flushes out faint-hearted tourists. articles.title: Binance releases proof of reserves
articles.description: The world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange Binance released its proof of reserves (PoR) on Friday to provide transparency on user funds.

articles.title: Bitcoin and ether are not securities, Belgian financial regulator says
articles.description: Belgium’s regulator stated that crypto assets like bitcoin and ether do not fall under regulations for securities, since they have no issuer.

articles.title: Belgium says BTC, ETH and other decentralized coins are not securities
articles.description: Belgium’s take on what conditions must be met in order for a crypto asset to be classed as a security are in contrast to the views of U.S. Securities Exchange Commission Chairman Gary Gensler.
